_comment: Starter architecture-fitness ruleset for the service/api quick-start family (grm-quick-start-template, #314). Adapt the layer globs to the project's real module layout — this is a starting point, not a fixed schema. The 'structure' block already matches docs/project-structure.md. To decline enforcement entirely, replace this file's contents with { "schema-version": 1, "opt_out": true, "opt_out-reason": "..." } — grm-architecture-audit surfaces that decision explicitly instead of silently passing. Design: docs/grimoire/design/architecture-fitness-design.md §Scaffold defaults.
